raw_response:
```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed <= expected, f"Unexpected outcomes present: {observed - expected}"
assert "000" in counts and "111" in counts, f"Missing expected outcomes: {expected - observed}"

c000 = counts["000"]
c111 = counts["111"]
total = c000 + c111

assert total == shots, f"Counts for expected outcomes do not sum to shots: {total} != {shots}"
assert abs(c000 - c111) <= 0.2 * shots, f"Expected similar frequencies for 000 and 111, got {c000} and {c111}"
```

```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = {str(k) for k, v in counts.items() if v > 0}
assert observed <= expected, f"Unexpected outcomes found: {observed - expected}"

c000 = counts.get("000", 0)
c111 = counts.get("111", 0)

assert c000 > 0, "Outcome '000' missing"
assert c111 > 0, "Outcome '111' missing"

diff = abs(c000 - c111)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"'000' and '111' frequencies are not similar enough: {c000} vs {c111}"
```

```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed <= expected, f"Unexpected outcomes present: {observed - expected}"
assert "000" in counts and "111" in counts, f"Missing expected outcomes: {expected - observed}"

c0 = counts["000"]
c1 = counts["111"]
assert c0 + c1 == shots, f"Expected only correlated outcomes totaling shots, got {c0 + c1} out of {shots}"

diff = abs(c0 - c1)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"Expected similar frequencies for '000' and '111', got {c0} vs {c1}"
```

```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = set(counts)

assert observed.issubset(expected), f"Unexpected outcomes found: {observed - expected}"
assert all(counts.get(state, 0) > 0 for state in expected), f"Missing expected outcomes: {expected - observed}"

c000 = counts.get("000", 0)
c111 = counts.get("111", 0)
diff = abs(c000 - c111)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"Expected similar frequencies for '000' and '111', got {c000} vs {c111}"
```

```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = {str(k) for k, v in counts.items() if v > 0}
assert observed <= expected, f"Unexpected outcomes found: {observed - expected}"

c000 = counts.get("000", 0)
c111 = counts.get("111", 0)
assert c000 > 0 and c111 > 0, f"Expected both '000' and '111' to appear, got counts={counts}"

diff = abs(c000 - c111)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"'000' and '111' frequencies are not similar enough: 000={c000}, 111={c111}, shots={shots}"
```

```python
allowed = {"000", "111"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed.issubset(allowed), f"Unexpected outcomes: {observed - allowed}"
assert "000" in counts and "111" in counts, f"Missing expected outcomes: {allowed - observed}"

c0 = counts["000"]
c1 = counts["111"]
assert c0 + c1 == shots, f"Counts for expected outcomes do not sum to shots: {c0} + {c1} != {shots}"

diff = abs(c0 - c1)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"Expected similar frequencies for '000' and '111', got {c0} vs {c1}"
```

```python
assert observed.issubset(expected), f"Unexpected outcomes found: {observed - expected}"
```

```python
c000 = counts.get("000", 0)
c111 = counts.get("111", 0)
```

```python
expected = {"000", "111"}
observed = {k for k, v in counts.items() if v > 0}

assert observed <= expected, f"Unexpected outcomes found: {observed - expected}"
assert "000" in counts and counts["000"] > 0, "Missing expected outcome 000"
assert "111" in counts and counts["111"] > 0, "Missing expected outcome 111"

c0 = counts.get("000", 0)
c1 = counts.get("111", 0)
total = c0 + c1

assert total == shots, f"Counts for expected outcomes do not sum to shots: {total} != {shots}"

diff = abs(c0 - c1)
assert diff <= 0.2 * shots, f"Expected similar frequencies for 000 and 111, got {c0} vs {c1}"
```

```python
allowed = {"000", "111"}
observed = {str(k).replace(" ", "") for k in counts.keys()}
assert observed <= allowed, f"Unexpected outcomes: {observed - allowed}"

c000 = counts.get("000", counts.get("0 0 0", 0))
c111 = counts.get("111", counts.get("1 1 1", 0))

assert c000 > 0, "Missing expected outcome 000"
assert c111 > 0, "Missing expected outcome 111"

total_allowed = c000 + c111
assert total_allowed == shots, f"Counts for allowed outcomes ({total_allowed}) do not match shots ({shots})"

diff = abs(c000 - c111)
assert diff <= max(1, 0.2 * shots), f"Outcome frequencies not similar enough: 000={c000}, 111={c111}, shots={shots}"
```
